summary: Added compound mode composition to ModeManager. Created `compoundModes.ts` with 3 compound mode definitions (cloud+wireframe, particles+flowribbon, crystal+microgeometry) and `buildCompoundEntries` factory that uses scaled quality profiles (50% budget per layer). Extended `quality.ts` with `scaleQualityProfile` (with minimum clamps) and `extractSystemConfig` for per-system config extraction. Refactored `modeManager.ts` to support `RotationEntry` discriminated union (single | compound) with full compound lifecycle: init/draw/cleanup/crossfade on both layers, primary layer selection for overlays, and `activeEntryName`/`isCompoundActive`/`activeMaxPoints` accessors. Backward compatible with existing `ModeEntry` interface. Low tier skips compound modes entirely. Wired in `main.ts` with system registry. All 1426 tests pass (39 new), build succeeds.
